name: --help
-h
options.description: Show help for ansible-lint

name: --list-rules
-L
options.description: List all the rules

name: --list-tags
-T
options.description: List all the tags and the rules they cover

name: --format
-f
options.description: Stdout formatting

options.name: -q
options.description: Quieter, reduce verbosity, can be specified twice

options.name: -p
options.description: Parseable output, same as '-f pep8'

options.name: --progressive
options.description: Return success if it detects a reduction in number of violations compared with previous git commit. This feature works only in git repositories

options.name: --project-dir
options.description: Location of project/repository, autodetected based on location of configuration file

name: --rules-dir
-r
options.description: Specify custom rule directories

options.name: -R
options.description: Keep using embedded rules when using '-r'

options.name: --write
options.description: Allow ansible-lint to reformat YAML files and run rule transforms

args.name: WRITE_LIST
args.description: Limit the effective rule transforms by passing a keywords 'all' or 'none' or a comma separated list of rule ids or rule tags

options.name: --show-relpath
options.description: Display path relative to CWD

name: --tags
-t
options.description: Only check rules whose id/tags match these values

options.name: -v
options.description: Increase verbosity level (-vv for more)

name: --skip-list
-x
options.description: Only check rules whose id/tags do not match these values

name: --warn-list
-w
options.description: Only warn about these rules, unless overridden in config file defaults to 'experimental'

options.name: --enable-list
options.description: Activate optional rules by their tag name

options.name: --nocolor
options.description: Disable colored output, same as NO_COLOR=1

options.name: --force-color
options.description: Force colored output, same as FORCE_COLOR=1

options.name: --exclude-paths
options.description: Path to directories or files to skip. This option is repeatable

options.name: --config-file
options.description: Specify configuration file to use. By default it will look for '.ansible-lint' or '.config/ansible-lint.yml'

options.name: --offline
options.description: Disable installation of requirements.yml

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version of ansible-lint
